mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar_event(user_id, user_goal_id, calendar_event_title, calendar_event_description, calendar_event_start_time, calendar_event_end_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{userGoalId}, #{calendarEventTitle}, #{calendarEventDescription}, #{calendarEventStartTime}, #{calendarEventEndTime})
mapper.select: SELECT calendar_event_id, user_goal_id, calendar_event_title, calendar_event_start_time, calendar_event_end_time, calendar_event_is_done FROM calendar_event WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT calendar_event_title, calendar_event_description, calendar_event_start_time, calendar_event_is_done, user_goal_id, user_goal_title FROM v_calendar_event_with_goal WHERE calendar_event_id = #{calendarEventId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar_event(chat_room_id, calendar_event_title, calendar_event_description, calendar_event_start_time, calendar_event_end_time) VALUES(#{chatRoomId}, #{calendarEventTitle}, #{calendarEventDescription}, #{calendarEventStartTime}, #{calendarEventEndTime})
mapper.select: SELECT calendar_event_id, calendar_event_title, calendar_event_start_time, calendar_event_end_time, calendar_event_is_done FROM calendar_event WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId}
